/cwe/weakness/1050.Name: Excessive Platform Resource Consumption within a Loop
/cwe/weakness/1050.Description:
The product has a loop body or loop condition that contains a control element that directly or
					indirectly consumes platform resources, e.g. messaging, sessions, locks, or file
					descriptors.
/cwe/weakness/1050.ExtendedDescription: This issue can make the product perform more slowly. If an attacker can influence the number of iterations in the loop, then this performance problem might allow a denial of service by consuming more platform resources than intended.
